title: In-step turn question
description: Persisted record of a `request_human_input` turn emitted by a provider_step (F-012). Lives at `.pdh-flow/runs/<runId>/turns/<nodeId>/turn-NNN-question.json`. The matching answer file (turn-NNN-answer.json) is written by the user / Web UI / CLI; the engine polls for it and resumes the provider session.

turn.description: 1-based turn counter within this (node, round) execution. Distinct from the review-loop round.

session_id.description: Provider session id captured immediately before the question was raised. Used to resume after the answer arrives.
